name: Emmaus Life Sciences, Inc.
summary: Emmaus Life Sciences, Inc. is a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on rare and orphan diseases. Its sole product, Endari (prescription grade L-glutamine oral powder), is FDA-approved to reduce acute complications of sickle cell disease in adults and pediatric patients aged five and older. Endari is also approved in UAE, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, and Oman, and sold through distributors in the U.S. and MENA region.
